brand.name: Credence
brand.tagline: Bet on the truth, not the odds

hero.title: Bet on truth, not odds
hero.subtitle: Localized prediction markets for Southeast Asia crypto users. Polymarket-native liquidity, zero markup.

wallet.no_injected_wallet: No injected wallet detected in this browser. Open the app in a browser with MetaMask, Rabby, OKX Wallet, or another injected wallet extension — not the WorkBuddy preview panel.
wallet.connector_unavailable: Wallet connector unavailable. Refresh and retry.
wallet.request_pending: The wallet extension still has an unfinished connection request. Reset this page's connection state below first; if it still fails, open the wallet extension and approve, reject, or close the old request. A web page cannot force-cancel a wallet extension permission request.
wallet.connection_reset: This page's connection state was reset. Click Connect Wallet again; if the wallet still reports pending, close or reject the old request inside the extension.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.geo_blocked: Service not available in your region.

legal.risk_disclaimer: Prediction markets involve risk of financial loss and are intended for adult, eligible users only. Confirm your jurisdiction permits such trading.
